name: sparkcommerce
description: SparkCommerce AI — 电商影像实验室 (Monorepo)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.build:prod: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client && npm run build:images
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w client
